---
title: "Ryan Mooney"
image: images/headshot2.png
toc: false
about: 
   template: trestles
   image-shape: rounded
   image-width: 17em
   links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ryanmooney1
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/rymooney
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:rmmj2023@mymail.pomona.edu
    - text: CV
      href: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1w1SbAwWlfGOGqOSWWsFMGZmgbWWrx7zE/view?usp=sharing
---

# Ryan Mooney

### Goldwater Scholar • Beckman Scholar
### Cancer Immunology • Biophysics • Translational Research

## Investigating how T cells recognize cancer

I am a Molecular Biology student at **Pomona College** interested in cancer immunology, mechanobiology, and translational oncology. My research combines **biophysical approaches, computational analysis, and molecular biology** to understand how immune cells recognize and respond to cancer-specific neoantigens.

Currently, I am studying the **kinetic and mechanical determinants of T-cell receptor (TCR) recognition** of neoantigens and developing quantitative methods to characterize biomolecular interactions using **surface plasmon resonance (SPR)**.

After graduation, I plan to pursue a **Ph.D. in Immunology or Cancer Biology** and contribute to the development of next-generation cancer immunotherapies.
